title: Hand Towels 600gsm ZERO TWIST Cotton Highly Absorbent & Quick Dry Luxury Hotel Quality Luxe Collection Fade Resistant 50x80cm (Silver Grey, Pack Of 2)

Suitable for men, women, children and other types of people use, regardless of the season. Super soft, absorbent, plush & quick dry towel.

* Premium fade resistant cotton hand towel hotel quality these large hand towels are made from 100% pure natural cotton. * Do not use bleach, fabric softeners, and iron as it may damage its quality; always wash the luxe towels separately to minimize lint & absorbent, yet light-weighted, gives your hand & body a soft and delicate touch while absorbing the moisture. These hand towels will continue to retain their vibrant colors even after many times of washing as long lasting & durable in nature. The cozy touch of these premium hand drying towels is like having the most luxurious hotel towels in your own home.
description: Product Description Experience Pure Comfort with Every Pat Zero Twist Hand Towels Hand Towels for Bathroom : These towels are specifically designed for use in the bathroom. Hand towels are smaller in size compared to bath towels and are ideal for drying your hands or face after washing. 100% Egyptian Cotton : Egyptian cotton is known for its exceptional softness and durability. It is considered one of the finest cotton varieties available, making these towels luxuriously soft and long-lasting. Zero Twist : Zero-twist cotton refers to a special weaving technique where the cotton fibers are left un-twisted, resulting in a plush and fluffy texture. Zero-twist towels are known for their superior absorbency and softness. Super Soft & Absorbent : These towels are designed to be incredibly soft against your skin while efficiently absorbing moisture, ensuring you can dry your hands or face comfortably and effectively. Multipurpose Use : While primarily intended for use in the bathroom, the "multipurpose use" suggests that these towels can have various applications beyond the bathroom, such as in the kitchen, gym, or even as a travel accessory. Size: 50 x 80 cm : The dimensions of these towels are 50 centimeters in width and 80 centimeters in length. This size is suitable for hand towels and provides ample coverage for drying hands or face. Zero Twist, Maximum Comfort: Your Bathroom Essential The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. At the heart of these hand towels lies the premium quality of Egyptian cotton. Known for its exceptional softness and durability. The long, fine fibers of this cotton variety contribute to a soft and luxurious feel that's unrivaled by many other materials. The Art of Pampering: Zero Twist Hand Towels, Wrap Yourself in Softness What sets these towels apart is the innovative zero-twist technology used in their production. Unlike traditional towels that are woven with twisted yarns, zero-twist towels are crafted with untwisted fibers, resulting in a plush and fluffy texture.
